name: AWS Bedrock Successful Model Invocation Logs Deletion Detected
description: This model alerts when someone has deleted model invocation logs in Amazon Bedrock. This indicates someone trying to cover their tracks after or before a potential security breach or policy violation that could disrupt AI model settings or expose sensitive data.

rules.name: AWS Bedrock Successful Model Invocation Logs Deletion Detected

author: Yash Verma
